title: 日本ダービーの後に・快挙達成！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka takes on this unprecedented challenge
and comes out as the Japanese Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd erupts at her victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the press conference after the race, Vodka
declares that she will keep up this momentum by
going to run internationally.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This challenge was not in our plans, but it's too late to take it back now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give her the okay, and Vodka gets excited to go
abroad.
